{{Quote|While it may resemble a metallic spider, the Commerce Guild droid wields considerable firepower in its blaster cannon.|Commerce Guild Droid 81|<ref name="ATCCG">{{TCG|set=Attack of the Clones|cardname=Commerce Guild Droid 81}}</ref>}}
'''81''' was the designation of an [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droid]] produced by [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]] for the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]]. Unit 81 fought in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] that marked the beginning of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="ATCCG" />

{{Droid-stub}}
